title: Signature S101 Cordless Jug Kettle, Boil Dry and Overheat Protection, Removable and Washable Filter, 1.7 Litre, White
features: 1.7 Litre capacity boils up to seven cups of water at once

description: From the manufacturer Signature S101 1.7 Litre Electric Jug Kettle, White With a generous 1.7 Litre capacity, this electric jug kettle boils up to 7 cups quickly and efficiently. Boil Up to 7 Cups in One Go This kettle features 3kW rapid boil action, meaning your water will be ready in no time, and a generous 1.7L capacity, allowing you to make up to 7 drinks with just one use. You can also easily keep an eye on the water level, thanks to the clear water window. Durable and Stylish Design This kettle is made from sturdy stainless steel and features an attractive jug design, making for both a sturdy and eye-catching addition to your kitchen. Safe and Easy to Use Highly visible light for easy usage making it suitable for all users and clear water gauge for accuracy and precision.
